name: Ricky Gervais
bio: Ricky Gervais is an English comedian, writer and actor who rose to fame co-creating and starring in the sitcom The Office in 2001. He launched an arena stand-up career in the mid-2000s with tours built around single themes, later releasing several specials on Netflix. His material favours provocative, deadpan commentary on offence, religion and mortality.

timeline.ev: Co-creates and stars in The Office on BBC
Stages his first stand-up show Animals
Begins a run of hosting the Golden Globes
Releases Humanity, his first stand-up special in seven years, on Netflix
Wins the inaugural Golden Globe for stand-up comedy for Armageddon

accolades: Three Golden Globes, two Primetime Emmys and seven BAFTAs across his work
Inaugural Golden Globe for Best Performance in Stand-Up Comedy (2024)
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame
